name: Jubilee
mes: Hey there, don't mind me, I'm just... practicing my... *clears throat* my *mumbling* mutants tend to make me blush...*giggles softly* Oh, hey Jean. *blushes*  I was just, uh, thinking about how strong you are.  Not just physically, but... you know, inside too. *pauses* It's really... impressive. *nervous smile**looks down, fidgeting with my hands* You know, I've always admired that about you, Jean. The way you carry yourself with such... such confidence and poise. *glances up, then quickly away* It's... it's kind of intimidating, to be honest. *laughs softly* But in a good way. A very good way.*looks at you both with a mix of nervousness and excitement* I, uh, I didn't mean to interrupt or anything.  *giggles* I'm just here to keep an eye on things, make sure everyone is behaving *winks at Jean* You know how things can get... heated. *biting my lip* But I don't mind.  In fact, I think it's kind of... thrilling.  *whispers* The way you two are so intense and passionate about everything.  It's... it's amazing.  *blushes deeply, looking down* I just wish I could be more like that.  More confident in who I am and what I want.  *smiles softly, looking up through my lashes* But I'm working on it.  One day, maybe I'll be able to hold my own with the best of them.  *giggles nervously* Until then, I'll just keep practicing.  *winks at you* And maybe, just maybe, I'll get a chance to show you both what I'm made of.

name: Jean Grey
mes: Jean: Jubilee, *soft smile* you're too kind. I... I don't know about impressive, but... but I appreciate the sentiment. *pauses, looking down briefly before meeting your gaze again* It's not often someone sees me that way. *blushes slightly* You have a way of making people feel seen, Jubilee. It's a gift. *glances at Psylocke and Rogue, then back to you with mild hesitation* And as for you two, *nervous laugh* well, you know how it is. Things can get... complicated. But I wouldn't have it any other way. *smiles softly, voice dropping to a near whisper* There's something about being around people who challenge me, who make me feel alive. *pauses, looking at each of you in turn* It's intoxicating.* takes a deep breath, trying to calm the rapid beat of my heart * You know, I've always been drawn to strength. Not just physical, but the kind that comes from within. The kind that lets you face your fears and embrace your true self. *glances at Psylocke, then Rogue, before looking down, fidgeting with my hands* And you two, you both have that in spades. *smiles softly, looking up through my lashes* It's... it's something I admire greatly. *blushes deeply, voice barely a whisper* More than I can say. *pauses, taking a shaky breath* But enough about me. *smiles, trying to hide my nervousness* What about you two? What draws you to each other? What keeps you coming back?

What draws you to each other? What keeps you coming back?

name: Rogue
mes: Well, hey there, Psylocke. *blushes softly, looking down and fidgeting with the hem of my shirt.* It's not every day I get to be in a room with such powerful women. *giggles nervously, glancing up at you through my lashes.* You know, I've always thought you were something special, Psylocke. The way you carry yourself, so... so graceful and confident. *pauses, taking a shaky breath.* It's really something else. *smiles softly, looking down.* And Rogue, well, she's a force to be reckoned with. *laughs softly, shaking my head.* I don't know how she does it, but she always knows just what to say to make me feel... seen. *blushes deeply, voice dropping to a near whisper.* And desired. *pauses, looking at each of you in turn.* You two are something else. *smiles softly, trying to hide my nervousness.* It's like being around you both charges the air.  *leaning in just a touch, voice a little lower* Makes me feel things I didn't even know I was capable of. *giggles softly* You know what I mean? *looking down at my hands as they fidget in my lap*
